name: Prime Plus Mortgages - Phoenix Hard Money Loans
description_short: Phoenix-based hard money lender specializing in fix-and-flip, rental, and investment property loans with same-day approvals and funding in 48 hours.
description_long:
Prime Plus Mortgages is a hard money lending company based in Phoenix, Arizona, focused exclusively on real estate investment financing. The company positions itself as a lender run by real estate investors for real estate investors, emphasizing speed and flexibility as core differentiators in the hard money lending space. According to their website, they have funded over $250 million across more than 1,000 hard money loans for Arizona-based real estate investors.

The company offers a range of hard money loan products tailored to investment real estate, including fix-and-flip loans, bridge loans, rental property financing, short sale loans, home rehab loans, and real estate note investing products. Loan terms feature up to 90% LTV (loan-to-value ratio), rates starting from 10.99%, same-day approval capabilities, and funding within 48 hours of approval. The company claims to have approval timelines as fast as 1 hour and advertises minimal upfront fees compared to traditional lenders.

Prime Plus Mortgages differentiates itself through speed-focused operations and lower down payment requirements relative to competitors in the Arizona hard money market. Their marketing emphasizes the time-sensitive nature of real estate deals and positions rapid approval and funding as the primary value proposition. The company serves Phoenix and surrounding Arizona Valley markets and claims 180+ five-star reviews.

As a hard money lender, Prime Plus Mortgages operates in a specialized financing niche with higher rates and fees than traditional mortgages, reflecting the short-term, asset-based nature of hard money lending. Borrowers should understand that hard money loans are designed for experienced real estate investors with specific exit strategies, not primary residence financing. While speed and flexibility are genuine advantages for time-sensitive investment deals, borrowers should carefully evaluate total loan costs and their investment property's profitability before proceeding.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same-day approval and 1-hour turnaround claims with 48-hour funding capability
Up to 90% LTV on hard money loans, reducing required down payment compared to traditional lenders
Claims lowest hard money down payments in Arizona with no costly upfront fees
Specializes exclusively in real estate investment properties, offering product variety including fix-and-flip, bridge, rental, and short sale loans
Company leadership has direct real estate investing experience, claiming to understand investor timelines and deal requirements
Over $250 million in historical funding volume with 1,000+ hard money loans issued
Asset-based underwriting approach that prioritizes property value and deal structure over credit score alone
cons: Hard money rates starting at 10.99% are significantly higher than conventional mortgage rates (typically 6-7% range)
Limited to real estate investment properties—does not offer primary residence mortgages or traditional home purchase loans
As a hard money lender, total loan costs (rates + fees) can substantially reduce profit margins on investment flips
Company relies heavily on marketing claims without independent third-party verification of approval speed or 1-hour turnaround guarantees
No transparent fee schedule or rate card published on website; borrowers must apply or call for actual pricing
best_for: Real estate fix-and-flip investors needing rapid capital deployment with short exit timelines
Experienced rental property investors seeking bridge financing or cash-out refinancing on investment portfolios
Real estate investors with strong deal fundamentals but limited liquid capital for down payments
diagnosis: Prime Plus Mortgages is best suited for experienced real estate investors with investment properties, solid deal fundamentals, and short-term exit strategies who prioritize speed over traditional mortgage rates. The critical caveat is that hard money loans carry substantially higher rates and fees than conventional mortgages and are designed for investors, not homebuyers—and total loan costs can significantly impact deal profitability.
services: Bridge loans for real estate investors
Investment property consultations for Arizona-based investors
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 7137 E Rancho Vista Dr b05, Scottsdale, AZ 85251
